response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified on-screen text: "ファンサ" (Fansa) and "ギターと孤独と蒼い惑星" (Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Hoshi). 2. Performer: Ceres Fauna (confirmed visually). 3. Song 1 Metadata: "Fansa" by HoneyWorks. 4. Song 2 Metadata: "Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Hoshi" by Kessoku Band. 5. Search queries: ' "ファンサ" HoneyWorks Japanese and English lyrics ' and ' "ギターと孤独と蒼い惑星" Kessoku Band Japanese and English lyrics '. 6. Successfully retrieved both lyrics and English translations for both songs. JSON structure generated accordingly.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by Ceres Fauna of Hololive, featuring "Fansa" (by HoneyWorks) and "Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Hoshi" (by Kessoku Band). The songs are separated by a brief transition.

scenes.description: Ceres Fauna starts singing "Fansa" on a stage with neon decorations. The song title "ファンサ" appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
好きになって!もっと!私を見て!もっと!
恩返しが"愛のこもった投げキッスで"
気のせいじゃない 目はあってるよ
(ハート)作って恋しちゃって下さい
やれること何でもします NG無しで
エゴサで見つけたアンチのコメント
ふざけんな!誰よりも知ってるもん
でも大丈夫 ステージに立つ!
ファンサしちゃうぞ(・ω＜)
はぁ…終わりが…寂しいな…嬉しいな…!
君に愛のビームをあげるよ!
大歓声!もっと!まだまだ!ねえ?もっと!
受け止めてね 愛のこもったわがままソング
ファンサしちゃうぞ(・ω＜)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Fall in love with me! More! Look at me! More!
Your reward is "A blown kiss full of love"
It's not your imagination, I am meeting your eyes
Make a ♡ (heart) and please fall in love with me!
I'll do whatever I can, no "NGs"
I found an anti's comment on a search
Don't be silly, I know better than anyone
But it's okay, stand on the stage!
I'm gonna fan-service you (・ω＜)
Ah... The ending... I'm so sad... But I'm happy...!
I'll cast you a Mona-beam full of love in return!
Big applause! More! Still more! Hey? More!
Take into your heart my self-indulgent love song
I'm gonna fan-service you (・ω＜)

scenes.description: Ceres Fauna transitions into singing "Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Hoshi". The song title "ギターと孤独と蒼い惑星" appears in the top-left corner.
scenes.song_title: Guitar to Kodoku to Aoi Hoshi
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
突然降る夕立 あぁ傘もないや嫌
空のご機嫌なんか知らない
季節の変わり目の服は 何着りゃいいんだろ
春と秋 どこいっちゃったんだよ
息も出来ない 情報の圧力
めまいの螺旋だ わたしはどこにいる
こんなに こんなに 息の音がするのに
変だね 世界の音がしない
足りない 足りない 誰にも聞かせられない
吐き出し口がない
行き場のない この蒼い惑星で
息を吐いて 空を蹴るよ
なんにもいらない わたしはここにいる
この孤独な ギターと蒼い惑星で
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A sudden evening shower, no umbrella, ugh
Why would I know how the sky feels?
What should I wear for the changing seasons?
Where did spring and autumn go?
I can't even breathe, it's the pressure of information
A spiral of dizziness, where am I?
Even though I can hear my own breathing so clearly
It's strange, I can't hear the sounds of the world
It's not enough, not enough, I want to scream at someone
I don't know where to let this out
I don't have anywhere to go, this is a blue planet
I'm breathing in, kicking the sky
I don't care about anything, I'm just here
And my only weapon is my guitar, it's so heavy!
